description: Build smoke: generate the ISO and verify the branded boot entry, ISO label, and bundled appliance overlay are present.
Installer config sanity: verify the Ubuntu Server install path still preserves a user-confirmed storage flow before any wipe.
Offline bundle sanity: confirm the install flow can resolve the appliance payload from the ISO without network access.
Post-install boot guard: verify a completed install boots the disk-first path when the completion marker is present.
End-to-end VM smoke: boot the ISO, confirm storage, complete installation, reboot, and verify the system lands on the installed disk and reaches appliance readiness.
Host-service static UI smoke: setup page, setup config API, JSON setup submission, status page, and Next static assets are served successfully.
Build staging verifies the packaged status UI includes both status and setup routes.
Installer config sanity verifies both network and storage are listed as interactive sections.
